name: hugoblox
description: Hugo's Roblox dev toolkit: skills que construyen juegos de Roblox de CALIDAD (sin look de IA) usando el MCP oficial de Roblox Studio. Modos: horror, backrooms, obby, tycoon, simulator, shooter, tower-defense, survival, racing, roleplay-town, escape-room + sistemas (game-ui, key-door-monster, npc).
